tool_args.label: Diversity Committee Meeting - December 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Metropolitan Transportation Authority Diversity Committee Meeting December 2021

payload.title: Diversity Committee Meeting
payload.description: MTA Diversity Committee meeting materials including September 2021 meeting minutes, 2021 and 2022 work plans, executive summary, and reports on business diversity initiatives, DBE certification, EEO activities, small business development program, M/W/DBE and SDVOB contract compliance, capital projects, financial services, asset fund managers, and 2022 EEO/ADA/Title VI policy statements.
